TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_bakan, title = bakan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/bakan} }

S.FORM: == bakan == ŚąÄ / u bakan sa sapikasuy nu tatama. siwkay nu bakan u bakan sa, u sapicikcik a sakulak, masinang i tatapal, kyu taneng micikcik tu tuutuud. tayza i buyu atu maluk, sibakan tu ku tademaw. taneng sapikawaw, taneng sapidiput, anu izaw ku aadupan, taneng patalaw atu midebung. tinaku a kamu pabakanen / taneng tu pabakanen ku wawa ni Benel ci Kumad. sibakan Śł∂ŚąÄ / caay ka walesay sibakan ku tatama tahekal. sibakanay Śł∂ŚąÄÁöĄ / au ci Kacaw ku sibakanay tayza i buyu'. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika . ŚąÄ(disambiguation) is an East Asian word which means sabre, knife, or certain types of sword.
S.PHON: == bakan == * / u bakan sa sapikasuj nu tatama. siwkaj nu bakan u bakan sa, u sapi ¶ik ¶ik a sakur~…ĺak, masinaŇč i tatapar~…ĺ, kju tan…ôŇč mi ¶ik ¶ik tu tuutuud. tajza i buju atu mar~…ĺuk, sibakan tu ku tad…ômaw. tan…ôŇč sapikawaw, tan…ôŇč sapidiput, anu izaw ku aadupan, tan…ôŇč patar~…ĺaw atu mid…ôbuŇč. tinaku a kamu pabakan…ôn / tan…ôŇč tu pabakan…ôn ku wawa ni b…ôn…ôr~…ĺ ¶i kumad. sibakan ** / ¶aaj ka war~…ĺ…ôsaj sibakan ku tatama tańß…ôkar~…ĺ. sibakanaj *** / au ¶i ka ¶aw ku sibakanaj tajza i buju Ē~ °. u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika . *(disambiguation) is an …ôast asian word wńßi ¶ńß m…ôans sabr…ô, knif…ô, or ¶…ôrtain tjp…ôs of sword.
S.FORM: == bakan == ŚąÄ / u bakan sa sapikasuy nu tatama. siwkay nu bakan u bakan sa, u sapicikcik a sakulak, masinang i tatapal, kyu taneng micikcik tu tuutuud. tayza i buyu atu maluk, sibakan tu ku tademaw. taneng sapikawaw, taneng sapidiput, anu izaw ku aadupan, taneng patalaw atu midebung. tinaku a kamu pabakanen / taneng tu pabakanen ku wawa ni Benel ci Kumad. sibakan Śł∂ŚąÄ / caay ka walesay sibakan ku tatama tahekal. sibakanay Śł∂ŚąÄÁöĄ / au ci Kacaw ku sibakanay tayza i buyu'. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika . ŚąÄ(disambiguation) is an East Asian word which means sabre, knife, or certain types of sword.
